title: grangea latifolia
intro: Grangea latifolia, also known as broad-leaved grangea, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues. In traditional herbal preparations, Grangea latifolia is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects and is also used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
